betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Chemical Reactor§f is a 3×4×4 multiblock (TileChemicalReactor.java:23) that mixes up to three §6fluid§f inputs (or two fluids + an item) under heat and pressure to produce advanced chemicals — §6rocket fuel§f, §6bipropellant fuel§f, §6nitrogen tetroxide§f, and the §6oxygen§f + §6hydrogen§f precursors for the §6Atmosphere Terraformer§f.

§6Production Path (libVulpes RecipesMachine + TileChemicalReactor.java)§f:
- Built via §6Crafting Table§f: 1x §6Gold Plate§f (libvulpes:productplate:2), 1x §6Item IO Circuit Board§f (advancedrocketry:ic:4), 1x §6Machine Structure§f (libvulpes:structuremachine), 1x §6Control Circuit Board§f (advancedrocketry:ic:3), 1x §6Liquid IO Circuit Board§f (advancedrocketry:ic:5)
- Power: scales with recipe; `powerPerTick = ceil(getPowerMultiplierForRecipe(recipe) * recipe.getPower())` (TileChemicalReactor.java)
- 3 input slots (2 fluid, 1 item) + 3 output slots (2 fluid, 1 item) when fully hatches-equipped
- JEI category: §6Advanced Rocketry: Chemical Reactor§f

The reactor is the prerequisite for §6bipropellant fuel§f, which in turn feeds the §6Bipropellant Rocket Motor§f used by every orbital rocket in the late game. It is also required for the §6Astrobody Data Processor§f (10020) chain when paired with the §6Atmosphere Analyzer§f (10062).

§eTip§f: Build a redundant §6Liquid IO Board§f on the output face — many high-tier recipes output two fluids and one item, and a single output hatch will bottleneck the recipe.
